creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #4)
You are using your own action instead of bsd-ipfw. May I ask why?
In your action you don't add a rule for table 1. Do you do it in another place?
From the log output it looks that actionban fails. Does it work if you do it from the command line?

BR Christoph
